reviews.review_description: Hello owner this game looks really amazing but the problem is I cannot play it. when I join in the ￼game I’m stuck in the air and can’t move. What should i do?

developer_response.body: Hello! Thanks for this review, To answer your question all you have to do is First, Try to rejoin and see if it works, if not try waiting for about 1 minutes to drop. Thanks!
